additionalInfo.description: Function to check status of device. In particular, it controls whether the measures of the sensors are too different from devices of the same environment.
node to calculate averages of current device and the others to compare them and give possible alarms
node to evaluate if there is a consistent difference between the averages of all the other devices and the average of the current one
send alarm if the device has different temperature from the rest of the devices
send alarm if the device has different humidity from the rest of the devices
send alarm if the device has different weight from the rest of the devices
send alarm if the device has different noise from the rest of the devices
change originator to add general average to the asset as a server attribute

configuration.tbelScript: return {msg: msg, metadata: metadata, msgType: msgType};

additionalInfo.description: edit message as a request to post attributes leaving only the essential elements for that target
error reported when there is a failure in changing the originator into the asset which contains the devices
save the attributes that should be useful for that asset
send alarm if the device has different noise from the rest of the devices
